category_sources: Official GitHub repository describes Hayagriva as Rusty bibliography management.
source_facts.description says Hayagriva is a bibliography management tool.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub repository and README use Hayagriva.
docs_sources: No separate docs site found in source_facts; official GitHub README is the primary documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has value https://github.com/typst/hayagriva; per instruction repo returned as null without second-guessing.
tags_sources: Official README documents bibliography entries, citation formatting, BibLaTeX conversion, and CLI commands.
